T0205.title: IOU App Data
T0205.definition: A data package from high-interest or private lending containing signed IOUs, personal identity information, and contact details of borrowers.
T0205.description: This data typically leaks from illegal lending platforms or private loan shark groups and contains detailed borrower privacy information. After acquisition, underground actors use it for secondary fraud, aggressive debt collection, or resale to other criminal groups. Victims are highly susceptible to scams due to the data's authenticity and the debt relationship involved.
T0205.usageExample: "Selling real-time IOU data, risk-control data, high volume, guaranteed first-hand source, good price"
